description_long: This is a large, rectangular wooden shelving unit with a natural light brown finish. The upper section consists of four rows of open square cubby shelves, each row containing four compartments, ideal for displaying books, decor, or storage bins. The lower section features a set of four cabinet doors, each equipped with a vertical handle, providing concealed storage space. The back panels of the shelves appear to be a lighter color, possibly a painted or laminated surface, contrasting with the wood frame. The sides are solid and flat, with no visible openings or features. This piece is robust and functional, suitable for use in public libraries, offices, or community centers in urban environments.
description: A large, light brown wooden shelving unit with open cubby shelves above and four cabinet doors below, featuring vertical handles and a contrasting back panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing all open cubby shelves and four cabinet doors with handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, flat wooden panel with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate front view showing the back panels of the shelves and the plain cabinet doors without visible handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing a solid, featureless wooden panel.
